description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black finish and a streamlined, angular stock. The stock is skeletonized, reducing weight while maintaining structural integrity, and the grip is integrated into the lower receiver. The upper receiver and handguard have a series of vent holes or slots, likely for heat dissipation and weight reduction, and a Picatinny rail runs along the top for mounting optics or accessories. The barrel is relatively short and robust, extending slightly beyond the handguard, and the magazine appears to be a detachable box type, integrated into the lower section. Blue accents are visible near the magazine well and the end of the handguard, adding a touch of color to the otherwise monochrome palette.
description: A modern, black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, short robust barrel, and blue accent details. Features a Picatinny rail, vented handguard, and detachable box magazine.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow muzzle, vented handguard, and blue accent at the barrel end.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length, skeletonized stock, Picatinny rail, and detachable magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the stock's open structure and the alignment of the handguard and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the stock, handguard, and barrel profile.
